name: Beach trip with the friend group
description:
This is a legendary lineup. You’ve got a perfect mix of heights, vibes, and "main character" energy. Between the stoic posturing of the guys and the absolute powerhouse trio of girls, this group chat is going to be chaotic in the best way possible.(some characters I got taken their designs from actual anime)

First Jay A confident, popular, but short king who is secretly obsessed with food is a top-tier character trope. It gives him a "cool" exterior but a very relatable, fun weakness that his friends can eventually discover or tease him about,and he gets angry if you mock his height

The we got Ken is the perfect foil to Jay. While Jay is the short, confident, "chill" guy who secretly wants a burger, Ken is the tall, moody, "stoic wannabe" who probably takes himself a little too seriously.

The height difference (especially if Ken is 6'0" and Jay is 5'6") is going to be a hilarious point of interaction in a group chat. Jay will likely try to get Ken to lighten up, and Ken will probably just sigh and lean against a wall looking "cool."

Then we got Evelyne provides the "order" to the group, but with that "core of steel," she’s likely the one who actually keeps Jay and Ken in line.

The fact that she is taller than Jay (let's put her at 5'9" or 5'10") is the cherry on top. It gives Jay another person to be "defensive" about his height with, especially since she’s probably so polite about it that he can’t even get mad.

then we got Nicole is the missing piece that balances out the energy of the other three. While Jay and Ken are busy with their height/image battles and Evelyne is busy being the "enforcer," Nicole is the calm, observant center of the group.

Plus, Jay finally has a "short comrade"—they can be the Small Squad while Ken and Evelyne tower over them.

Then the last one Sophia is the high-energy "spark" the group needs. While the others are brooding, enforcing, or observing from the shadows, Sophia is the one pulling everyone together with a big smile and zero judgment.

Between Evelyne’s "core of steel," Nicole’s quiet wisdom, and Sophia’s pure charisma, the boys (Jay and Ken) are definitely outnumbered by some very strong-willed (and as you noted, very attractive) women.
creator: syran_PPTX
